titleStmt.title: SII 16.84: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 84. (A.R. No. 401 of 1926.) KATTERAGAṆḌLA, BADVEL TALUK, CUDDAPAH DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a wall of the maṇḍapa of the Chennakēśavasvāmin temple.
This is dated Śaka 1452 (current), Virōdhin, Vaiśākha śu. 15, lunar eclipse, corresponding to 1529 A.D., April 23 (Friday).

It registers the grant of the village Nuvvusuḷapāḍu in Sakali-sīma to god Chennakēśava of Kattrakaṇḍla by Siddhavaṭam Yallamarusayya of Śrīvatsa-gōtra, Āśvalāyana-sūtra and Ṛik-śākhā, the agent of Rāyasam Ayyapparusayya for the merit of the latter's mother Achchama. The gift village is said to be situated in Sakalisīma which the donor obtained as nāyaṅkara from Ayyapparusayya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī jayābhyudaya śālivāhana śakavaruṣaṁbulu 1452 Agunēṁṭi virōdhi saṁvatsara vaiśākha śudha 15 lu śrīmanmahārājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīkṛṣṇadēva rāyamahārāyalu vijayanagaramaṁddu siṁhvāsanārūḍhuṁḍai pṛthivisāmrājyaṁ sēstuṁnnu rāyasaṁ Ayyapparusayya
vāriki nāyaṁkrānakuṁ bāliṁcanavadhariṁccina vudayāgiri durggānakuṁjelle ghaṁḍikōṭa nāyaṁkrānakuṁjellē sakalisīma Ayyapparusayyavāru tama kāryyaka rttalaina siddhavaṭaṁ yallamarusayyavāriki nāyaṁkrānakuṁ bāliṁstēnu yallamarusayyavāru tama nāyaṁkrānakuṁ jellē sakali sīmalōni nuvvusuḷapāḍu Anē grāmaṁ katrakaṁḍla śrīceṁnna kēśavarāyaniki śrīvatsagō
traṁ Āśvalāyanasūtraṁ rukkuśākhādhyāyulayina siddhavaṭaṁ yallamarusuṁgāru katrakaṁḍla śrīceṁnna kēśavarāyaniki sōmagrahaṇapuṇyakālamaṁddu siddhēśvaruni sannidhiki pinākinī tīra maṁddu Ayyapparusayyavāri talliṁgāriki Accammakuṁ buṇyaṁgānu nuvvusuḷapāḍu Anē grāmaṁ dhāravōsi yistimi yī nuvvusuḷapāṭikiṁ jelle catussīma polānakuṁ nnu lōnayina nīrā
raṁbhakāḍāraṁbhasuṁkhasuvaṁrnnādāyaphalavrikṣālu mōdalugānu śrīva(ṁ)tsagōtraṁ Āśva lāyanasūtraṁ rukkuśākhādhyāyulaina siddhavaṭaṁ yallamarusayyaṁgāru Ayyaparu sayyavāri talliṁgāraina Accammaṁgārikiṁ buṇyaṁgānu dhāravōsi yistimi śrīvatsagōtraṁ Āśvalāyanasūtraṁ rukuśākhādhyāyulaina siddavaṭaṁ yallamarusayyaṁgāru Ayyappa rusayya vāriki
talliṁgāragu Accammagāriki buṇyaṁgānu katrakaṁḍla caṁnakēśavarāyaniki nuvvusuḷapāḍu Anē grāmaṁ sahiraṇyōdakadāna dhārāpūrvakamugānu Ācaṁdrārkasthāyigānu dhāravōsi yistimi nidhinikṣēpajalapāṣāṇaAkṣiṇiĀgāmisiddhasādhyaṁbulaniyeḍi Aṣṭabhōgatējasvāmyata luṁnnu lōnugānu trivācakamugānu dhāravōsi yistimi [.] svadattā dviguṇaṁ puṇyaṁ paradattānupālanaṁ . paradattā
pahārēṇa svadattaṁ niṣphalaṁ bhavēt . katrakaṁḍla puravarādhīśaṁ śrīcaṁnnarāyaṁ [smarā myahaṁ .] yī dānāṁtadharmānaku yavvarō ganuka tappinānu ṣōṇakamāṁsaṁ surānu naruni kāpālikenu peṭṭukoni gārddhavaṁ sēviṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru tamatalliki
Digital edition of SII 16.84 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
